WEALTH MANAGEMENT SERVICES
Simplifying Wealth for Canadians
SCHEDULE A CALL
Build the life you want with the goals that matter.
We offer holistic, full-service Wealth Management services to Canadians and their families. Our team will help you cut through all the busy noise and help find the financial goals that really matter to you. Reach out to us to today to find out how we help make wealth simple.
30+
Years Serving Canadians
2700+
Client Families
$7B+
Assets Under Management
THE ADVICE YOU NEED

Business Owners
Elevate your personal and business finances with integrated wealth management services designed to streamline your success across all your ventures.
BOOK A MEETING WITH US
Family Wealth Management
Secure your family’s financial future with customized planning that grows with you through every stage of life.
BOOK A MEETING WITH US
Doctors and Dentists
We offer tailored Wealth management services for Canadian healthcare professionals. We can help understand and maximize your unique financial opportunities with strategies that align with your demanding career and personal life.
LEARN MORE
Entering Retirement
Transition smoothly into retirement with strategies that protect your wealth and ensure you enjoy your hard-earned years to the fullest.
BOOK A MEETING WITH US
Surviving Spouses
We provide compassionate, empathic planning and investment services for surviving spouses. Receive supportive, thoughtful financial guidance that helps you manage and protect your wealth during challenging times.
BOOK A MEETING WITH US
Women & Wealth
Leverage your professional success into lasting financial security with bespoke wealth management that matches the scale of your ambitions.
BOOK A MEETING WITH US
Institutional Asset Management
We offer dedicated support tailored to the needs of foundations, endowments, and not-for-profit organizations.
LEARN MORE
Finding and Funding a Good Life
Grounded in the science of happiness, this guide helps you prioritize long-term life satisfaction over a simple bank balance and provides a comprehensive analysis of evidence-based investment strategies, distilled into actionable insights for the modern investor.

Meet Our Team
Meet the team that is making an impact for Canadian investors. We’re here to help guide you with expert advice and dedicated service. Our mission is simple: to turn your financial goals into reality, with personalized strategies that fit your life.
MEET OUR TEAM
BECOME A CLIENT
Our Services
Financial Planning
Plan for your future with our holistic 360° planning services. Our advisors work with you to create a detailed, personalized strategy that encompasses all of your goals so when you retire it’s on your terms and timetable.
READ MORE
Portfolio Management
Unlock the full potential of your investments with our expert portfolio management services. We’ll craft a personalized investment strategy that aligns perfectly with your financial goals, adjusting to market changes to keep your future secure and bright.
READ MORE
Financial Wellness Coaching
Financial advice isn’t just numbers, it’s also about your unique circumstances and personal goals. Any destination might encounter some bumps along the way, but we’ll make sure you have the right guidance to get you there.
READ MORE
LET’S GET STARTED
Schedule a call with a PWL Capital advisor for a free financial review.
BOOK A CALL
Stay Safe from Scams
Individuals claiming to be advisors at PWL use messaging services, social media, and other platforms to create fraudulent accounts to gather personal information.
To better protect you, we have outlined best practices to help you avoid falling victim to these scams.
READ MORE
You've Got Questions? We have the answers.
Check our FAQs for common questions. If you can’t find what you’re looking for, reach out to us and we will be happy to respond.
What are PWL Capital's fiduciary duties?
Who does PWL Capital work with?
What is PWL Capital Wealth Management Philosophy?
What are “Investable Assets”?
What is the minimum amount of investable assets needed to work with PWL?
Do you offer one-time fee-only planning?
`
Portfolio Management and brokerage services are offered by PWL Capital Inc. which is regulated by the Canadian Investment Regulatory Organization (CIRO), and is a member of the Canadian Investor Protection Fund (CIPF).
Financial planning and insurance products are offered by PWL Advisors Inc. and are regulated in Ontario by Financial Services Regulatory Authority of Ontario (FSRA) and in Quebec by the Autorité des marchés financiers (AMF). PWL Advisors Inc. is not a member of CIPF.
